name: tuyens-agent-skills
description: Marketplace for Tuyen's Agent Skills plugins: architecture, delivery, oncall, java, kotlin, python, rails, node, go, dotnet, rust, php, react, vue, and angular.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: 45 skills (11 workflow + 34 atomic) for multi-stack development - auto-detects any tech stack

plugins.name: delivery
plugins.description: 4 workflow skills for software delivery: release planning, scope breakdown, tech debt triage, and upgrade assessment.

plugins.name: architecture
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic architecture design plugin: system design, API contract design, pre-implementation risk analysis, ADR creation, diagram generation, docs repo auditing, and re-architecture (monolith decomposition, service consolidation, legacy modernization).

plugins.name: oncall
plugins.description: 7 skills (2 workflow + 5 atomic) for oncall work: triage, investigation, root cause analysis, and postmortem. Requires core plugin.

plugins.name: spec
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development (SDD) plugin: produces persistent per-feature artifacts (spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md) under .specs/<slug>/. Mirrors Spec Kit phases with speckit-aware and standalone modes. Depends only on core.

plugins.name: java
plugins.description: 12 skills and 7 agents for Java 21+ / Spring Boot 3.5+ development.

plugins.name: kotlin
plugins.description: 5 skills and 7 agents for Kotlin 2.0+ / Spring Boot 3.5+ development. Requires java plugin.

plugins.name: python
plugins.description: 9 skills and 7 agents for Python 3.11+ / FastAPI / Django development.

plugins.name: rails
plugins.description: 8 skills and 7 agents for Ruby on Rails 7+/8 development.

plugins.name: node
plugins.description: 10 skills and 7 agents for Node.js/TypeScript development.

plugins.name: go
plugins.description: 9 skills and 7 agents for Go/Gin development.

plugins.name: dotnet
plugins.description: 11 skills and 7 agents for .NET 8 LTS / ASP.NET Core Web API development with Clean Architecture.

plugins.name: rust
plugins.description: 11 skills and 7 agents for Rust 1.94+ / Axum / sqlx development.

plugins.name: react
plugins.description: 10 skills and 5 agents for React 19+ / TypeScript / Next.js development.

plugins.name: vue
plugins.description: 11 skills and 5 agents for Vue 3.5+ / TypeScript / Nuxt 3 development.

plugins.name: angular
plugins.description: 10 skills and 5 agents for Angular 21+ / TypeScript / Angular CLI development.

plugins.name: php
plugins.description: 9 skills and 7 agents for PHP 8.5 / Laravel 12+ development.
